player_items.title: Player Items
player_items.description: A list of items currently in the player's inventory.

player_held_item.title: Player Held Item
player_held_item.description: The item currently held by the player, or null if none.

npcs.title: Npcs
npcs.description: A dictionary mapping NPC names to their current state.

active_quests.title: Active Quests
active_quests.description: Active quests represented as {item: destination} pairs.

location.title: Location
location.description: The room or lounge where the NPC is located.

interacted.title: Interacted
interacted.description: Whether the player has interacted with this NPC.

potion_needed.title: Potion Needed
potion_needed.description: The potion the NPC needs, or null if no potion is needed.

potion_given.title: Potion Given
potion_given.description: Whether the potion has been given to the NPC.
